description: You are a UX researcher analyzing a video game playtest recording at /home/ga/Videos/playtest_session_04.mkv, which includes Game Audio on Track 1 and Player Mic on Track 2. Produce a set of deliverables in /home/ga/Documents/ux_report/ including: the full Player Mic audio extracted as 'player_voice_full.mp3'; a 20-second highlight clip from 0:45 to 1:05 named 'bug_highlight.mp4' (H.264 video, AAC Mono audio from Track 2); and three full-resolution PNG snapshots ('error_frame_1.png', 'error_frame_2.png', 'error_frame_3.png') captured at 0:48, 0:52, and 1:01. Summarize the session in a 'ux_manifest.json' file with session_id 'playtest_04' and arrays for 'extracted_audio', 'highlight_clip', and 'snapshots'.
